summary: Base W6 — ~17 mpw (~10% bump per §11.D), polarized ~85% Z1. SCHEDULE REVISED 2026-05-27 (§2.A): Hyp A moved Tue → Wed (decouples the lift from the Tue threshold, retiring the recurring Adj #16 same-day friction); the midweek Z1 easy run moved Wed → Thu; Thu is no longer flex-rest — revert to rest only on yellow/red mornings (§11.C). Sat double (long run AM + Hyp B PM) unchanged. Mon strides + Tue T-re-test (5×5 @ 8:00, RPE 7, peak 183 → 8:00/mi locked, Adj #26) + Wed Hyp A all logged. Thu logged 5/28: first relocated midweek Z1 easy run executed clean — 30 min, 2.85 mi @ 10:30/mi, cadence 172, HR avg 160 (coolest read in the recent block); pace honesty held at the Z1 floor, no carry-forward. Fri up next: 30-min progression, last 10 @ M (8:30/mi) — Base quality #2, no VO2max yet. Sat is the big bump day: lat 145 + restore 4 sets (Adj #17), chest-supp row 85 (Adj #18), cable lat 20/side (Adj #19), seated calf 335 (Adj #22); holds preacher 55 (Adj #21/#30) + tri pushdown 52.5 → bump 55 (Adj #20 cleared/#28); soleus restore + push duration/knee (Adj #14/#23). Hill strides eligible W7 Mon (SI gate met). Run-MHR retest still priority (Adj #9).

days.note: Logged — 4×20s flat strides, cadence 180/178/196/180 spm; reps 1/2/4 held ≤180 (rep 4 textbook 180@6:00/mi), rep 3 overshot to 196 like Fri 5/22. Adj #24 mostly addressed → Adj #25. Hill strides online W7. No lift.

days.session: Threshold 5×5 min @ T (1 min rec) — run only
days.note: Logged — 5×5 @ 8:00/mi, cadence 180, HR 167/177/179/180/183 (peak 183 = lowest T-peak in log) at RPE 7 (RIR 2). Adj #16 SATISFIED → 8:00/mi locked as current T pace (Adj #26). Run-only now: Hyp A relocated to Wed per §2.A revision. Run-MHR retest still owed (Adj #9).

Logged — Incline 140×5/5 RIR 2/1 (+ accidental 145×5 RIR 0 to failure) → +5 to 145 next Wed; tri pushdown 52.5 cleared (Adj #20→#28) bump 55; preacher 55 held, set 3 failure (Adj #21/#30 open); DB lat raise soft + 16-rep failure → bump 27.5 (Adj #29); soleus restored to 60s (Adj #14/#23→#31 satisfied); cable crunch 65 clean. No run.

Logged — 2.85 mi / 30:00 @ 10:30/mi, cadence 172, HR avg 160 (coolest read in the recent block). First relocated midweek run (Wed → Thu, §2.A revision) executed clean; pace honesty held at the Z1 floor (no creep). No carry-forward.
Quality day #2 — last 10 min at M pace (8:30/mi). Base block, no VO2max yet (§4.C). Nasal gate is the reference (Adj #9), off-191 ≤155 cap is artifact.

days.session: Long Z1 55 min AM + Hyp B PM (≥6h gap)
